items.title: The future of Bharat’s economy is being built beyond cities
items.summary: Across Bharat, demand is moving beyond essentials into categories such as education, mobility, healthcare, insurance, appliances, digital commerce and lifestyle-led services.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.
